title: Sunglasses
description: Added a cool and useful pair of sunglasses for minecraft.
body:
![sunglasses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8083743326efd8e0ff2dd63daf60501de1b23545_0.webp)
## Description
Added a cool and useful pair of sunglasses.  
_Inspired by the sonic sunglasses from Doctor Who._  
You can wear it and use a hotkey（Default keybinding: N） to enable night vision (global effect), as well as clear vision in lava and water.
## Config
 If you want to adjust the position of the sunglasses on your face, you can open the configuration interface using a customizable hotkey（Default keybinding: F10） and make the adjustments.
## integration
Compatible with Curios API and Create. When Create is present, the sunglasses behave identically to Create's goggles in player use, and the recipe will be adapted to work with Create.
